topic: Retention vs. deletion of sensitive user inputs

position_a.claim: Uploaded documents should be securely deleted immediately after the session ends to minimise retention risks.

position_b.claim: The agency must retain user prompts and uploaded source documents to preserve adequate evidence of how AI outputs were generated.
support: (NAA AI Records Guidance, §Disposal of generative AI assistant prompts and inputs)

why_unresolved: Both positions are well supported by their respective frameworks (privacy minimization vs. Commonwealth recordkeeping). Resolution requires a human policy judgement on how to balance privacy risks with evidentiary requirements.
